Traders

Shani
Security
28 quests

Shani fights an uphill battle to keep Speranza safe. She could use a hand, but don't look at her sideways.

Celeste
23 quests

A survivor of the First Wave, Celeste now tries to keep Speranza running smoothly. It's an entirely different challenge.

Tian Wen
Gun Shop
13 quests

Some call Tian Wen the "gun nut", but that's just half the truth. She also has a supernatural knack for tech and construction.

Apollo
Grenades & Gadgets
11 quests

When he's not dealing in explosives, Apollo is an avid flute player, so pray he won't blow his fingers off.

Lance
Clinic
9 quests

Need health items? The only thing Lance can't cure is the common cold.

No traders match your search.

A Bad Feeling

A Better Use
TianWen
▸ Request in a Supply Drop from a Call Station
▸ Loot a Supply Drop

A Toxic Trail
Shani
▸ Return to the Water Intake below the Water Treatment Control building
▸ Search the swamp for traces of the barrel's origins
▸ Take a photo of the barrel truck
+1 more objectives
A Toxic Trail Quest Guide
Deciphering The Data
Shani
▸ Use the Magnetic Decryptor in the Fuel Control Building
▸ Reach the Arrival Building in Spaceport
▸ Use the Magnetic Decryptor on the top floor of the Arrival Building
Deciphering The Data Quest Guide
Down To Earth
Shani
▸ All Objectives in one round
▸ Visit a Field Depot
▸ Deliver a Field Crate to a Supply Station

Down To Earth Quest Guide
Greasing Her Palms
Celeste
▸ On Dam Battlegrounds, visit the Locked Room in the Water Treatment Control Building.
▸ On Spaceport, scope out the rocket thrusters outside the Rocket Assembly
▸ On Buried City, visit the barricaded area on floor 6 of the Space Travel Building.
Greasing Her Palms Quest Guide
Groundbreaking
Apollo
▸ Enter the locked room at Pilgrim's Peak
▸ Search the room for any construction research
▸ Find the building pictured on the whiteboard
+1 more objectives

▸ Loot an ARC husk
